title: Was Asuka Awake When she Laid down next to Shinji in Episode 9
display_title: Was Asuka Awake When she Laid down next to Shinji in Episode 9
wikitext:
[]: Was Asuka Awake When she Laid down next to Shinji in Episode 9?             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Sat May 27, 2023 3:19 pm This was the DDR/Wall of Jericho episode. Re-watched the episode in Japanese with English subs. While Asuka did say she was "joking" that Shinji tried to kiss her the night before their mission to beat Israfel, one detail made me think otherwise. Asuka moves her head at the same time Shinji does when he moves in to kiss her, while "sleeping." So, was she awake? Or was she feigning sleep? Still not sure.

[]: Re: Was Asuka Awake When she Laid down next to Shinji in Episode 9?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sat May 27, 2023 3:24 pm I think she was asleep at the time. She was most likely sleeping walking into Shinji’s room, so she probably unconscious at that time and was unaware she went into his room.

[]: Re: Was Asuka Awake When she Laid down next to Shinji in Episode 9?             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Sat May 27, 2023 4:54 pm C.T.1290 wrote: I think she was asleep at the time. She was most likely sleeping walking into Shinji’s room, so she probably unconscious at that time and was unaware she went into his room.

[]: Re: Was Asuka Awake When she Laid down next to Shinji in Episode 9?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sat May 27, 2023 6:06 pm Asunji_Yuko wrote: C.T.1290#940801 wrote: I think she was asleep at the time. She was most likely sleeping walking into Shinji’s room, so she probably unconscious at that time and was unaware she went into his room.

[]: Re: Was Asuka Awake When she Laid down next to Shinji in Episode 9?             Quote Post by Capo98y » Sat Aug 19, 2023 1:57 pm The fact that she started crying makes me thing she was sleeping

[]: Re: Was Asuka Awake When she Laid down next to Shinji in Episode 9?             Quote Post by C.T.1290 » Sat Aug 19, 2023 9:33 pm Capo98y wrote: The fact that she started crying makes me thing she was sleeping

[]: Re: Was Asuka Awake When she Laid down next to Shinji in Episode 9?             Quote Post by Capo98y » Sun Aug 20, 2023 5:46 am C.T.1290 wrote: Capo98y#941612 wrote: The fact that she started crying makes me thing she was sleeping

[]: Re: Was Asuka Awake When she Laid down next to Shinji in Episode 9?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Aug 25, 2023 6:33 am I think she was definitely awake when she walked in, I don't get where ppl get the idea of attributing it to something as rare as sleepwalking when she's never shown to suffer from that before or after. From the sounds you hear she first just went to the toilet but then on the way back decided to plopp down next to Shinji because she was presumably feeling lonely being alone in a new place in a foreign country. Though I would assume that she went out like a light the moment she laid down cause she obviously wouldn't mumble about her mom or cry about it if she was fully awake. (then again, she thought he was asleep.) So then the day after she would not know what he did but she remembers plopping down next to him, & since she generally assumes all men are horny bastards because of her father ditching her mom for a newer model, she would expect that he did something horny. Planting her boobs in front of his face was probably an attention-getting ploy, not that it justifies his behavior. This is her being like, "Oh, he wants me because he's horny and I'm so hot!" to explain away/ re-interpret that she came to him because she was lonely (and perhaps no less hormonal. Or looking for his interest to affirm her attractiveness, even if she was going to reject him as beneath her. ) This is explicitly paralleled in EoE when Shinji wakes up to find her next to him (& probably why it enrages him so much - she says she wants nothing to do with him but hes good enough as a comfort object... though of course hes very guilty of the same by that point and murdering her is not the answer, to say the least) The Rebuilds also show her deliberately walking over cause she felt lonely - though of course that time it goes different because she actually asks Shinji if she can stay with him, so instead of frustrated horniness there is an actual heart-to-heart - still, it's meant to contrast/parallel the original scene, much like, say, the twist to the elevator situation.
